name: Product description
note: Must mention all 3 features, under 600 chars
response: Elevate your coding experience with the **Wireless Mechanical Keyboard**—a powerful tool designed for programmers. Features a **hot-swappable switch** system, allowing you to customize your layout on the fly, and a **split design** for seamless integration into your workflow. Equipped with **programmable layers**, you can tailor your keyboard to your specific needs, from simple tasks to complex scripting and programming environments.

name: Summarize to exact length
response: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) revolutionized our understanding of the early universe, revealing galaxies forming just 300 million years after the Big Bang. Its infrared instruments allowed us to study exoplanet atmospheres, detecting water vapor, carbon dioxide, and sulfur dioxide. The $10 billion mission, a joint effort between NASA, ESA, and CSA, is expected to last at least 20 years, significantly extending its original 5-10 year design life.

name: Compress to word limit
response: A CPU (Central Processing Unit) processes instructions from memory, performs calculations, and executes operations. It uses multiple cores to handle multiple tasks simultaneously. The CPU fetches instructions, decodes them, and executes them on the CPU's cores. It also manages memory operations and communication with other components.

response:
